description: AI-powered inline code suggestions using DeepSeek API
configuration.title: DeepSeek Inline Copilot
config.apiKey: DeepSeek API Key. Get it from [platform.deepseek.com/api_keys](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys)
config.model: Model name. Recommended: `deepseek-v4-flash` (fastest), `deepseek-v4-pro` (best quality), or custom names.
config.baseUrl: API base URL. Change if using a proxy.
config.triggerMode.manual: Manual: only when trigger key is pressed
config.triggerKey: Key to manually trigger a new suggestion
config.triggerKey.tab: Tab: accepts or triggers (no conflict with ghost text)
config.triggerKey.altSlash: Alt+/: only triggers, zero key conflict
config.languageFilters: Limit completions to specific languages. Example: ["python", "latex"]. Empty = all languages.
config.debounceMs: Typing pause before sending API request (ms). Lower = faster response, higher = fewer API calls.
config.completionCooldownMs: Minimum interval between completions (ms). 7000ms ≈ 8 requests/min. Higher = lower cost.
config.maxPrefixLines: **【Code files】** Lines BEFORE cursor sent as context. More lines = better suggestions but higher cost.
config.maxSuffixLines: **【Code files】** Lines AFTER cursor sent as context.
config.textMaxPrefixLines: **【Text files】** Lines BEFORE cursor (for .txt/.md/.html etc). Default 5 lines ≈ ~300 chars. Applies to plaintext, markdown, HTML, JSON, YAML, etc.
config.textMaxSuffixLines: **【Text files】** Lines AFTER cursor (for .txt/.md/.html etc). Default 3 lines ≈ ~180 chars.
config.maxTokens: Max output tokens per completion. ~$0.00007 at 256 tokens (v4-flash output $0.28/1M). 4096 ≈ $0.0011.
config.reviewMaxTokens: Max output tokens for error checking. ~$0.00007 at 256 tokens.
config.errorCheck: Enable real-time error checking and correction suggestions
config.errorCheckDebounceMs: Pause before running error check (ms). Higher = fewer API calls.
config.errorCheckMaxLines: Lines around cursor to check for errors. 10 lines ≈ ~150 input tokens (~$0.00002). Higher = broader check.
command.reviewDocument: DeepSeek Copilot: Review Document for Errors
